summary: Comprehensive testing of NCAA Game Simulation website completed successfully. All backend APIs working correctly with Google Sheets integration. Frontend loads properly with March Madness design, all pages functional, auth flow working, and real data displaying correctly.
passed_tests: Standings API returns 8 teams per division A/B/C with correct fields
All-time rankings API returns team rankings with required fields
History API returns championship data with season/champion fields
Season 5 rankings API returns correct season data
Division A/B/C APIs return standings and games with correct structure
Google Sheets integration working with public data access
Auth endpoints properly return 401 for unauthenticated requests
Auth endpoints work correctly with valid session tokens
Landing page loads with March Madness design and sign-in button
Dashboard shows real data: division standings, all-time top 5, championships
Standings page shows A/B/C division tabs with team data tables
All-Time Rankings page shows searchable rankings table
History page shows championship cards grouped by season
Season Stats page shows rankings and per-division games with week filter
Auth-protected routes redirect to landing when not authenticated
Auth flow with session token grants access to dashboard
